title: Cobblemon Pre-1.4 Apricorn Trees
description: Replaces Cobblemon's autumn-like apricorn leaf textures of 1.4+ to their original leaves and logs.
body:
Replaces Cobblemon's autumn-like apricorn leaf textures of 1.4+ to their original leaves and logs.

![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4450fa47354e441ef5bce2d1b25cd73e4154f6ba.png)

Note that this is not an entirely perfect reskin, all I did was use the color picker to replace the leaves' grayscaled texture.

Credit to the Cobblemon team for the amazing mod <3
